damageChat.name: Enhanced Damage Chat Messages
damageChat.hint: Automatically targets Save Tray participants for damage rolls and presets damage multipliers based on save results (e.g., half or none on save).

autoTemplateTargeting.name: Auto Template Targeting [experimental]
autoTemplateTargeting.hint: [experimental] V14 only. While previewing supported save area templates, automatically target matching tokens under the template.
